pageContext.name: Be@rbrick The Batman 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom are proud to present the Be@rbrick The Batman 100% and 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at approximately 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature the Dark Knight himself, ready to fight crime all over Gotham City.  DC Comics fans don't miss your chance to add this Batman Be@rbrick to your collection today!
